zh.lifeSummary: 當Katheryn Barber於1550年出生在英國爾普雷斯特波利時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Barber II27歲，母親Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor23歲。她於大約1568年與Sir James Harroppe在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年1月9日在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利享年70歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katheryn Barber于1550年出生在英国爾普雷斯特波利时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Barber II27岁，母亲Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor23岁。她于大约1568年与Sir James Harroppe在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1620年1月9日在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利享年70岁，埋葬在英国爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Barber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a barber, from Middle English barb(o)ur ‘barber’ (Anglo-Norman French barber, Old French barbier, from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’). In the Middle Ages barbers not only cut hair and shaved beards, but also practised surgery and pulled teeth.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name from German Barbier ‘barber’ (compare 1 above).
Catalan: occupational name for a barber, barber (see 1 above).

variants.name: Barbier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Emile, Pierre, Alexandre, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Laurette, Manon, Marcel, Marcellin, Michel.
French: occupational name for a barber-surgeon (see Barber ), Old French barbier (from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’). Compare Barbe and Barbee .
German: occupational name for a barber, from Middle High German barbierer, or an occupational name for an armorer, from barbier(e) ‘metal visor (to protect the face)’.

variants.name: Berber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Salvador, Guillermo, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Luis, Adriana, Alfredo, Angelina, Armando, Carlos.
Catalan: probably a variant of   Barber  . This surname is most common in Mexico.
Turkish: occupational name from berber ‘barber’.

variants.name: Barbero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ricardo, Alvino, Ana, Angel, Arsenio, Fernando, Gustavo, Jaime, Jose, Maribel, Mario, Nenita.  Italian Aldo, Angelo, Domenic, Ernani, Giulio, Italo.  French Emile, Yves.

Spanish and Italian (Piedmont): occupational name for a barber-surgeon, barbero, from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’ (from Latin barba); see also Barber . This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Barbieri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Vito, Rocco, Aldo, Cosmo, Dino, Domenic, Geno, Giovanna, Guido.
Italian: occupational name from barbiere ‘barber-surgeon’ (see Barber ), from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’.

variants.name: Barbour
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: occupational name from Old French barbeor ‘barber’. Compare the English form Barber .

History: George Barbour sailed from England on the Transport in 1635. He became a freeman of Dedham, MA, in 1647 and settled eventually at Medfield. A Scottish merchant named Barbour settled in eastern VA in the latter half of the 17th century.

variants.name: Borbely
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Antal, Ferenc, Ildiko, Kalman, Laszlo, Miklos.
Hungarian (Borbély): occupational name for a barber, Hungarian borbély. See also Barber .

variants.name: Barbeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Monique, Alcide, Alphonse, Amiee, Armand, Gisele, Jean Francois, Lucien, Lucienne, Michel.
French:

from barbeau ‘barbel’, a type of fish, hence a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, or a nickname for a man with a sparse beard, the fish being distinguished by beardlike growths on either side of its mouth.

nameMeanings.name: Katheryn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered spelling of Katherine , influenced by the productive name suffix -yn.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Variant of   Katherine .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Katheryn Barber was born in 1550, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Barber II, was 27 and her mother, Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor, was 23. She married Sir James Harroppe about 1568, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 9 January 1620, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katheryn Barber est née en 1550, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Barber II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Harroppe environ 1568, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1620, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katheryn Barber è nata il nel 1550 nel Prestbury, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Barber II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Harroppe circa 1568, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1620, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Katheryn Barber(이)가 1550년 영국 체실르 프레스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Barber II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir James Harroppe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 프레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katheryn Barber nasceu em 1550, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Barber II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Harroppe aproximadamente 1568, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1620, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katheryn Barber родилась в 1550 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Barber II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Harroppe около 1568 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 января 1620 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katheryn Barber nació en 1550, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Barber II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Grinling  Girling Barber  Barbor, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir James Harroppe aproximadamente 1568, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1620, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
